items.headline: FluidStack raising $1B at $18B valuation - Jane Street, Morgan Stanley
items.summary: FluidStack in talks to raise $1 billion at $18 billion valuation led by Jane Street and Situational Awareness, with Morgan Stanley advising.

items.headline: FluidStack valuation jumps 140% from $7.5B in December to $18B
items.summary: FluidStack's valuation more than doubled from $7.5 billion in December 2025 to $18 billion in April 2026 funding talks.

items.headline: FluidStack relocates headquarters from UK to New York after Anthropic deal
items.summary: FluidStack relocated headquarters from UK to New York following its landmark $50 billion Anthropic partnership.

items.headline: FluidStack pulled out of €10B France AI project to focus on US
items.summary: FluidStack withdrew from a key €10 billion AI project in France to focus on U.S. opportunities.

items.headline: FluidStack partners with Nvidia, Dell, Borealis for exascale clusters
items.summary: FluidStack partnered with Nvidia, Dell, and Borealis for exascale GPU clusters using renewable energy in Iceland and Nordics.

items.headline: Google considering $100M investment in FluidStack TPU expansion
items.summary: Google in talks to invest approximately $100 million in FluidStack tied to expanding TPU accelerator distribution.

items.headline: FluidStack raised $450M equity financing in January 2026
items.summary: FluidStack completed $450 million in equity financing in January 2026 according to Sacra research.

items.headline: FluidStack secured $10B GPU-collateralized debt from Macquarie
items.summary: FluidStack obtained up to $10 billion in debt financing capacity secured by GPU assets through Macquarie Group.

items.headline: FluidStack TeraWulf joint venture completes $500M+ project financing
items.summary: TeraWulf and FluidStack announced successful pricing of project financing for 168 MW HPC compute joint venture.

items.headline: FluidStack revenue grew from $1.8M (2022) to $66.2M (2024)
items.summary: FluidStack's revenue accelerated from $1.8 million in 2022 to $66.2 million in 2024 amid AI infrastructure boom.

items.headline: FluidStack employee count reaches 164 as of March 2026
items.summary: FluidStack's employee count reached 164 as of March 31, 2026, up from previous headcount levels.

items.headline: FluidStack manages over 100,000 GPUs across its platform
items.summary: FluidStack manages more than 100,000 GPUs across its network serving AI companies like Meta, Mistral, and Character.AI.

items.headline: FluidStack customers include Meta, Poolside, Black Forest Labs
items.summary: FluidStack counts Anthropic, Meta, Poolside, Black Forest Labs, and Mistral among its key customers.

items.headline: TeraWulf signs additional 160MW FluidStack expansion at Lake Mariner
items.summary: TeraWulf announced FluidStack exercised option to expand with additional 160 MW capacity at Lake Mariner campus.

items.headline: Google backstops $3.2B FluidStack obligations, gets 14% TeraWulf equity
items.summary: Google provides $3.2 billion backstop of FluidStack lease obligations and receives approximately 14% pro forma TeraWulf equity.

items.headline: FluidStack offers latest GPUs including H100, H200, B200, GB200
items.summary: FluidStack's infrastructure supports latest GPU hardware including H100, H200, B200, and GB200 chips at 95%+ theoretical performance.

items.headline: Google plans up to $40B investment in Anthropic amid FluidStack deals
items.summary: Google plans to invest up to $40 billion in Anthropic, with projects financially supported by Google including FluidStack data centers.

items.headline: FluidStack drops €10 billion French AI project to focus on US
items.summary: FluidStack pulled out of a high-profile €10 billion data center project in France as it pivots toward the US after winning larger contracts there.

items.headline: FluidStack raises $450M Series B at $7.5B valuation
items.summary: FluidStack raised $450M in equity financing in January 2026 with Google in talks to invest approximately $100M at a $7.5B valuation.

items.headline: Google backs FluidStack's $1.3B Abernathy project financing
items.summary: TeraWulf and FluidStack announced successful pricing of project financing for 168 MW HPC joint venture with Google backing $1.3 billion in lease obligations.

items.headline: FluidStack hiring across multiple roles in March 2026
items.summary: FluidStack is actively hiring for roles including Data Center Superintendent, Senior Civil Engineer, and Associate General Counsel across Texas, New York, and California.

items.headline: FluidStack relocates headquarters from UK to New York
items.summary: FluidStack shifted its global headquarters from the UK to New York in December 2025, prioritizing U.S. AI and data center buildouts.

items.headline: Google reportedly invests $100M in FluidStack at $7.5B valuation
items.summary: Google could reportedly invest $100 million in AI cloud operator FluidStack as part of an effort to boost adoption of its tensor processing unit artificial intelligence chips.

items.headline: FluidStack cancels Eclairion data center agreement in France
items.summary: FluidStack canceled an agreement to provide infrastructure at a Paris-suburb data center being developed by Eclairion, which is set to host French AI lab Mistral.

items.headline: FluidStack in talks for $700M funding round at $7B valuation
items.summary: Neocloud FluidStack is negotiating a funding round of nearly $700 million that would value the company at $7 billion, led by ex-OpenAI fund Situational Awareness.

items.headline: Anthropic partners with FluidStack for $50B US infrastructure
items.summary: Anthropic announced a $50 billion partnership with FluidStack to develop custom data centers in Texas and New York, creating 800 permanent jobs and 2,400 construction jobs.

items.headline: Hut 8 announces AI partnership with Anthropic and FluidStack
items.summary: Hut 8 announced a partnership with Anthropic and FluidStack to develop at least 245 MW and up to 2,295 MW of AI data center infrastructure at River Bend campus in Louisiana.
